mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT r.* FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role(role_code, role_name, description, status) VALUES(#{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET role_name = #{roleName}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_role SET deleted = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT permission_id FROM sys_role_permission WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
